input.text: My package arrived completely crushed — the box looked like it had been driven over. The tablet inside is cracked and unusable.
I was charged $149.99 on March 3rd but my plan is $99/month. I have never upgraded. Please explain this discrepancy.
The export to PDF feature silently corrupts files larger than 10 MB. I've reproduced it on three machines running version 4.2.1.
Hi, what are your customer support hours on weekends? I couldn't find this info on the website.
It would be great if the dashboard had a dark mode option. My eyes get strained during late-night work sessions.
Please cancel my subscription effective immediately. I have found a better solution for our team's needs. Please confirm cancellation and stop all future billing.
Just wanted to say — the new onboarding flow is fantastic. My team was up and running in under 20 minutes. Really impressive work!
I have been waiting 11 days for a resolution and every reply just says 'under review'. I need someone with actual authority to contact me today or I will dispute the charge with my bank.
